    • Using facet for Generalizability Theory

Generate Univariate Data

generate_univariate.Rd

Generate Univariate Data

Usage

generate_univariate(
  facets,
  vc,
  sd_residual,
  response_var,
  nested = NULL,
  prefix = ""
)

Arguments

facets

Named list of facet levels

vc

Named list of variance components

sd_residual

Residual standard deviation

response_var

Name of response variable

nested

Named list of nesting relationships

prefix

Prefix for level names

Value

Data frame with simulated data

On this page
